Event: Magic Well - September 2024
Event Date: 08/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A207


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Junk Chest
Reader's Card Artifact

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Wound Treatment
The unit's incoming and outgoing healing is increased by 50%.

When the artifact owner restores health, they restore 150000 health to 3 allies with the least health. The ability triggers only once per 3 sec.

Once in a while, casts restoration on the unit. It removes a random debuff from the artifact owner and restores 250000 health. Also, the unit's damage is increased by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
